understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate to a goal gem tile marked '+' by moving through a grid-based level while avoiding spikes. Each level allows 2 attempts with 50 turns each; if you die, you restart the level. You must complete all levels to win the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is performed with MOVE_UP, MOVE_DOWN, MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT commands, which move the player one tile in the chosen direction. Gravity is directional (in this episode, DOWN) and pulls the player downward when not supported, causing them to fall onto tiles below. Click actions can remove clickable tiles at a specified position, which may alter the environment. Spikes are hazardous: landing on a spike ends the current attempt. If an attempt fails, the level restarts with a penalty (the failure is recorded). The player has a limited number of steps per attempt (50 here). The game is won by finishing all levels efficiently (likely with minimal steps/failures).

understanding.goal_understanding: The goal is to navigate to a goal gem tile marked '+' by moving through a grid-based level while avoiding spikes. Each level allows 2 attempts with 50 turns each; if you die, you restart the level. You must complete all levels to win the game.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: Movement is performed with MOVE_UP, MOVE_DOWN, MOVE_LEFT, MOVE_RIGHT commands, which move the player one tile in the chosen direction. Gravity is directional (in this episode, DOWN) and pulls the player downward when not supported, causing them to fall onto tiles below. Click actions can remove clickable tiles at a specified position, which may alter the environment. Spikes are hazardous: landing on a spike ends the current attempt. If an attempt fails, the level restarts with a penalty (the failure is recorded). The player has a limited number of steps per attempt (50 here). The game is won by finishing all levels efficiently (likely with minimal steps/failures).
